subcodes.first_line: O trusted one [Amín] of ‘Abdu’l-Bahá! I have returned, I have returned! By way of Europe have I come back, a servant at the threshold, returning from flowering rose-gardens
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء باز آمدیم باز آمدیم از راه فرنگستان آمدیم بنده آستان آمدیم
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Eastern values; culture, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @praise of Western values; culture
